Result Distribution

ARES Score histogram and age vs Market Score view for the current result set.

ARES signal segmentConnected public rows
ARESMarketTrendConfidence

Signal read: The graphic summarizes connected public records that feed the board below.

ADVERTISEMENTQuiet placement after the first data board
Formula

ARES_PLAYER_SCORE

ARES Player Score combines position performance, efficiency, role usage, league context, volume availability, durability, trend form, and confidence. Market Score is a separate asset signal, not a transfer fee.

Confidence

Source Coverage + Recency

Confidence is a reliability label. It reflects source coverage, sample size, recency, rights status, metric completeness, and cross-source agreement.

Related Boards

Gap BoardFind the player signal above market attention.ARES RankingsSort the pure football quality board.Market RankingsCompare football asset strength.MethodologyCheck score, confidence, and source rules.

Premium Intelligence Teaser

Unlock component grades, comparable players, risk scores, team fit, movement history, and exportable boards.

Source + Trust

Visible player rows come from public_players.json. ARES Score is not a transfer fee. Market Score is not market price. Restricted commercial databases and restricted images are not scraped.

ARES Football Market is an independent public beta football intelligence product. About. Image credits. Global FootballARES Gridiron Market
